svg.title: Agents Customers Tickets - Architecture
svg.desc: Modular monolith architecture with HTTP layer and five modules. Admin Events provides websocket push for admin clients and a CDC-profile Kafka consumer that forwards consumed messages to websocket subscribers. Debezium streams MySQL changes to Kafka. Users API is a dedicated dependency row above Shared concerns, Configuration, and Persistence; only Persistence accesses MySQL. A second condensed replica view appears below, with title-only boxes and an offset full-size background frame to emphasize duplicated app shape. Boxes are clickable and link to source folders in the primary view.
svg.text: REST and websocket endpoints delegate to module application services.

a.text: Database is accessed through Persistence only
Database is accessed through Persistence only
